name: GitHub HTML Previewer
description: Render HTML files hosted on GitHub locally, instead of reading the raw source.

content_security_policy.sandbox: sandbox allow-scripts allow-forms allow-popups allow-modals; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https: http:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https: http:; img-src * data: blob:; font-src * data: blob:; connect-src * data: blob:; frame-src * data: blob:; child-src * data: blob:; media-src * data: blob:; default-src 'self' https: http: data: blob:
